text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Through pure tenacity, Narita Taishin<n>manages to
win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But the mistakes made during training<n>lead to her
breaking under the weight<n>of her mental and
physical<n>exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a<n>break from both
training and racing.
